name: dash0-agent-plugin
description: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

AGENT_NAME.title: Agent Name
AGENT_NAME.description: Agent name, used as service.name (optional, defaults to claude-code)

OMIT_USER_INFO.title: Anonymize User Identity
OMIT_USER_INFO.description: When true, hashes user.name and omits user.email. Default: false (real identity is sent).

OMIT_IO.title: Omit Prompts & Tool I/O
OMIT_IO.description: When true (default), omits prompt content and tool call inputs/outputs. Set to false to include full content.

TEAM_NAME.title: Team Name
TEAM_NAME.description: Team name (optional). When set, all spans are tagged with the dash0.team.name attribute.

SHOW_SESSION_LINK.title: Show Session Link Per Turn
SHOW_SESSION_LINK.description: When true, prints the session URL after every turn. Default: false (URL shown once at session start).
